name: sqlite
notes: Bootstrap reader/correctness reference for embeddability, corruption handling, and test discipline; not the intended long-term write-path identity.

name: duckdb
notes: Modern vectorized OLAP reference with strong SQL ergonomics.

name: rqlite
notes: Log-centric replication and CDC design reference.

name: riak
notes: Distributed datastore reference for CRDTs, causal context, anti-entropy, and future multi-node primitives.

name: eventstore
notes: Primary current-round reference for stream-oriented append contracts, optimistic revisions, checkpoints, and projection-owned derived state.

name: spacetimedb
notes: Realtime relational-runtime reference for reducers, subscriptions, and server-owned state synchronization over relational tables without turning Zeta.Core itself into a multiplayer/runtime product.

name: chaisql
notes: Modern embedded SQL reference with a pragmatic, still-growing feature set.

name: redis
notes: Redis-side reference for append-only persistence, modules, and modern data-engine evolution.

name: postgresql
notes: MVCC, planner, and WAL design reference.

name: mysql
notes: Broader SQL engine and storage reference.

name: mariadb
notes: General-purpose pluggable SQL engine reference, especially for multi-engine boundaries and HTAP-style composition.

name: mariadb-columnstore
notes: Columnar storage-engine reference for extent elimination, MPP query shaping, and HTAP-oriented row/column seams.

name: parquet-format
notes: Columnar file-format reference for row groups, page indexes, encodings, and external analytical interchange.

name: orc
notes: Columnar file-format reference for stripe and row-group indexes, bloom filters, and base-plus-delta compaction ideas.

name: voltdb
notes: Modern in-memory/distributed SQL reference. Uses the actively available open-source mirror.

name: foundationdb
notes: Transactional-substrate and layers-later reference for keeping future distribution over a smaller durable core.

name: tidb
notes: Distributed SQL reference for stateless SQL fronts, transactional KV ranges, and HTAP row/column seams.

name: cockroachdb
notes: Distributed SQL reference for layered SQL-to-KV architecture, serializable transactions, and quorum replication.

name: yugabytedb
notes: Distributed SQL reference for tablet-based sharding, PostgreSQL-compatible SQL, multi-region topology, and CDC seams.

name: mongodb
notes: Document-database reference for shard-key routing, replica-set-backed sharding, and flexible schema trade-offs.

name: cassandra
notes: Wide-column distributed datastore reference for LSM-based storage, tunable consistency, and partition-first data modeling.

name: neo4j
notes: Graph-database reference for property-graph modeling, relationship-first querying, and graph-native indexing/traversal patterns.

name: arangodb
notes: Multi-model database reference for combining document, graph, and key-value patterns behind one query surface.

name: memgraph
notes: In-memory graph database reference for real-time graph analytics, stream integration, and Cypher-oriented graph workloads.

name: janusgraph
notes: Distributed graph reference for massive-scale graph storage over pluggable backends and Gremlin-centric traversal patterns.

name: dgraph
notes: Distributed graph/database reference for GraphQL-native APIs, predicate sharding, and transactional graph storage.

name: nebulagraph
notes: Distributed graph database reference for graphd, storaged, and metad service separation at very large edge counts.

name: milvus
notes: Cloud-native vector-database reference for disaggregated vector retrieval, WAL-backed ingestion, and ANN serving at scale.

name: weaviate
notes: Vector/object database reference for hybrid vector plus inverted indexing, filtered ANN, and module-oriented ML integration.

name: qdrant
notes: Vector-database reference for strict filtered ANN, payload-aware HNSW design, and shard/replication safety controls.

name: chroma
notes: Developer-friendly AI database reference for embedded/server modes, simple collection APIs, and rapid local prototyping.

name: pgvector
notes: SQL-native vector indexing reference for integrating ANN and filtered similarity search into a relational engine.

name: faiss
notes: Algorithm/library reference for dense-vector ANN, compression, GPU search, and evaluation/tuning primitives.

name: kafka
notes: Replicated-log reference for partitioned append-only streams, durable offsets, compaction, consumer checkpoints, and future distribution/log-shipping boundaries.

name: redpanda
notes: Modern Kafka-compatible log-engine reference for Raft-backed streaming, tiered storage, and thread-per-core efficiency.

name: flink
notes: Streaming-dataflow reference for stateful/event-time processing, checkpoints, and SQL/Table APIs over streams.

name: materialize
notes: Incremental-view-maintenance reference for streaming SQL, always-fresh materialized views, and dataflow-oriented execution.

name: druid
notes: Real-time analytics reference for segment-oriented OLAP, deep storage, and ingestion/query service separation.

name: hadoop
notes: Distributed storage and batch-platform reference for HDFS, large-scale data movement, and storage/compute substrate design.

name: spark
notes: Distributed compute and Structured Streaming reference for batch/stream unification and SQL-facing dataflow design.

name: iceberg
notes: Open table-format reference for snapshots, hidden partitioning, schema evolution, and multi-engine analytical interoperability.

name: deltalake
notes: Lakehouse/log-table reference for ACID metadata logs, time travel, streaming/batch unification, and change-friendly analytical tables.

name: clickhouse
notes: Columnar OLAP reference for sparse primary indexes, vectorized execution, compression, and stateless-compute analytical scaling.

name: leveldb
notes: Classic embedded LSM-tree reference for sorted key-value storage, memtables, SSTables, and background compaction.

name: rocksdb
notes: Embedded LSM-tree reference optimized for flash and fast storage, with rich compaction and caching design trade-offs.

name: lmdb
notes: Memory-mapped embedded B+tree reference for zero-copy reads, copy-on-write pages, and high-concurrency read paths.

name: hdf5
notes: Scientific data-format reference for chunked multidimensional arrays, rich metadata, compression, and long-lived file interoperability.

name: zarr
notes: Chunked array and cloud/object-store-friendly format reference for multidimensional data, metadata-first chunking, and scalable scientific interoperability.

name: netcdf
notes: Scientific data-model reference for dimensions, variables, attributes, groups, and netCDF-4/HDF5-backed interoperability.

name: arrow
notes: Columnar in-memory/interchange reference for zero-copy transport, language-neutral schemas, and vectorized analytical data movement.

name: ignite
notes: In-memory data-grid and distributed SQL reference for colocated compute, distributed caching, and data-fabric patterns.

name: ncache
notes: .NET-centric distributed cache/data-grid reference for clustered application data, ASP.NET/session sharing, and Microsoft-ecosystem ergonomics.

name: infinispan
notes: In-memory data-grid reference for embedded/server modes, Hot Rod remote access, distributed caches, and transactional data-grid patterns.

name: hazelcast
notes: Open-source in-memory data-grid reference for clustered data structures, community-vs-enterprise packaging, and distributed compute/cache patterns.

name: geode
notes: Distributed in-memory data management reference for partitioned regions, continuous queries, and client/server cache-grid behavior.

name: protobuf
notes: Cross-language schema-and-wire-format reference for compact binary messages, code generation, and schema evolution.

name: grpc
notes: RPC stack reference for HTTP/2-based contracts, streaming APIs, and generated strongly typed service surfaces.

name: avro
notes: Schema-evolution and data-serialization reference, especially for event streams, data lakes, and language-neutral contracts.

name: capnproto
notes: Zero-copy serialization and capability-RPC reference from the Protobuf lineage, useful for low-latency transport ideas.

name: flatbuffers
notes: Zero-copy schema-and-buffer reference for low-allocation binary interchange and direct memory access patterns.

name: thrift
notes: IDL-plus-RPC reference for cross-language service contracts and transport/protocol separation.

name: bond
notes: Microsoft schema-and-serialization reference for strongly typed evolution-friendly contracts and RPC integration.

name: messagepack
notes: .NET-friendly compact binary serialization reference for low-allocation transport and caching payloads.

name: json-schema
notes: Schema-contract reference for JSON-facing APIs and metadata validation, even when the transport is not itself a binary wire protocol.

name: etcd
notes: Distributed key-value and Raft reference for membership, MVCC metadata stores, and production consensus-backed coordination.

name: hashicorp-raft
notes: Library-style Raft reference for embeddable consensus, snapshotting, log compaction, and storage abstraction seams.

name: openraft
notes: Rust Raft library reference with modern API design, storage separation, and strongly typed consensus state.

name: raft-rs
notes: Rust Raft core extracted from TiKV, useful for production-hardened consensus mechanics.

name: dotnext
notes: C#/.NET reference that includes cluster and consensus primitives, useful for idiomatic managed distributed-systems design.

name: nuraft
notes: C++ Raft library reference for embeddable consensus, snapshotting, and log replication mechanics.

name: omnipaxos
notes: Rust Paxos-family reference for multi-leader or flexible replication research beyond Raft-only thinking.

name: dqlite
notes: C-level distributed SQLite reference that combines Raft-backed replication with a relational engine, useful for SQL-plus-consensus seams.

name: zookeeper
notes: Distributed coordination reference for metadata trees, watches, leader election, and configuration/state management.

name: consul
notes: Distributed coordination and service-discovery reference for control-plane state, KV metadata, health checks, and multi-datacenter coordination.

name: bookkeeper
notes: Replicated log-storage reference for durable ledgers, metadata coordination, and log-service architectures adjacent to streaming systems.

name: rx-dotnet
notes: Rx.NET, Ix, and async-sequence reference for observable/event LINQ, async sequence operators, and idiomatic .NET reactive composition.

name: rxcpp
notes: C++ Reactive Extensions reference for push-based observable composition, schedulers, and low-level reactive operator design outside managed runtimes.

name: reaqtor
notes: Stateful event-processing and Nuqleon/Bonsai reference for checkpointable reactive runtimes, queryable observables, and portable serialized expression trees.

name: bonsai-rx
notes: Visual reactive programming reference built on Rx.NET, useful for observable/dataflow composition, interactive workflows, and .NET-friendly streaming tooling.

name: efcore
notes: Entity Framework Core reference for modern .NET LINQ provider design, change tracking boundaries, query translation, provider seams, and natural .NET-facing data access APIs.

name: dapper
notes: Dapper reference for low-overhead parameter binding, row materialization, and natural hand-authored SQL APIs that still feel idiomatic in .NET.

name: nats
notes: Subject-based pub/sub and request/reply wire-protocol reference for lightweight control-plane transport (circuit registration, shard gossip, liveness) adjacent to our Arrow Flight data-plane plan; Apache-2.0, small kernel, queue-group fan-out. See references/notes/NATS-RESEARCH.md.

name: nats-jetstream
notes: Durable streaming subsystem on top of NATS (MIT-licensed within the Apache-2.0 server repo; successor to retired NATS Streaming/STAN) — reference for stream+consumer abstractions, RAFT-backed replication, and AckExplicit/AckAll/AckNone semantics that map onto our DurabilityMode variants; candidate retraction-native ingestion source for ZSet delta feeds. See references/notes/NATS-RESEARCH.md.
